task: Ship chorus compose + 3 LLM integrations + agent step + when/memory primitives + visual editor CLI (generative) + cloud distribution design

phases.name: Intake
phases.notes: Spark UP (99Gi), CodeSight indexed, 7-task decomposition created

phases.name: Wheel-Scout
phases.notes: Landscape for NL-to-workflow + visual editor + cloud share

waves.description: Independent builds (compose, LLM integrations, when+memory, cloud design)
Dependents (agent-step needs LLM; visual editor needs compose)

decisions.decision: Visual editor = CLI-generated standalone HTML with React Flow via CDN (extends chorus ui --prompt philosophy per ROADMAP §7). Not a hardcoded drag-drop dashboard.
Cloud distribution MVP = template-share model (strip credentials, emit portable JSON). Preserves local-first thesis. Hosted-runtime deferred to design doc decision.
Test-writer sidecars DISABLED for this pipeline — each implementer writes own tests following chorus patterns. Reduces parallel agent count from ~12 to 6-7.
